title: task
description: framing.rs:391-394 - KissReader::try_read_frame skips inter-frame FEND padding with 'while buffer[start] == FEND'. But CMD byte 0xC0 (port 12, cmd 0) equals FEND. This causes the loop to skip over the CMD byte, then fail to find the frame, returning None. Frames on port 12 with command Data are silently dropped. Failure scenario: feed [FEND, 0xC0, FEND] to KissReader, call try_read_frame -> returns None instead of the frame.
close_reason: Fixed: KissReader::try_read_frame now uses position 1 as CMD directly (matching kiss_decode behavior), fixing silent frame drop when CMD=0xC0 (port 12). Added test_reader_cmd_equals_fend regression test.
